task_completion.description: Verify that the correct payment methods are enabled and disabled on the main Payments settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce Settings -> Payments tab. The toggle switches in the 'Enabled' column for 'Direct bank transfer' and 'Check payments' should be active (usually purple/blue). The toggle for 'Cash on delivery' must be inactive (gray).

task_completion.description: Verify the Title, Description, and Instructions for Direct bank transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Direct bank transfer' settings page. The 'Title' field should read 'Direct Bank Transfer'. The 'Description' field should start with 'Make your payment directly...' and the 'Instructions' field should start with 'Payment must be received within 5 business days...'

task_completion.description: Verify the bank account details for Direct bank transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Account details' table on the BACS settings page. There should be a row containing Account Name: 'Artisan Pottery Co', Account Number: '12345678', Bank Name: 'First National Bank', Sort Code: '01-02-03', IBAN: 'US64FNBK12345678901234', and BIC / Swift: 'FNBKUS33'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title and Description for Check payments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Check payments' settings page. The 'Title' field should read 'Check Payments'. The 'Description' field should read 'Pay by mailing a check to our studio.'

task_completion.description: Verify the Instructions for Check payments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Instructions' text area on the 'Check payments' settings page. The text must include the payee 'Artisan Pottery Co' and the mailing address '456 Clay Avenue, Portland, OR 97201'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin) being navigated in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the settings pages are genuine WooCommerce interfaces.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard WooCommerce styling, tabs (General, Products, Payments, etc.), and standard WordPress admin sidebars.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually saved the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Your settings have been saved.' success notice at the top of the page after the fields have been filled out, or observe the 'Save changes' button being clicked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: BACS Title: 'Direct Bank Transfer'. BACS Account Name: 'Artisan Pottery Co'. BACS Account Number: '12345678'. BACS Bank Name: 'First National Bank'. BACS Sort Code: '01-02-03'. BACS IBAN: 'US64FNBK12345678901234'. BACS BIC/SWIFT: 'FNBKUS33'. Check Payments Title: 'Check Payments'. Check Payments Instructions must include the keywords '456 Clay Avenue' and 'Artisan Pottery Co'.
